    G

    get(K) - Method in interface pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.hotel.utils.Map
    Zwraca wartość pod podanym kluczem lub null jeśli nie ma podanego klucza.
    get(K) - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.hotel.utils.MyMap
    Returns the value to which the specified key is mapped, or null if this map contains no mapping for the key.

    getEmail() - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Guest
    Returns the guest's email address if provided.
    getFirstName() - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Guest
    Returns the guest's first name.
    getGuests() - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Room
    Returns a live list of guests currently registered for the room.
    getHotel() - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.service.HotelService
    Exposes the underlying Hotel instance.
    getLastName() - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Guest
    Returns the guest's last name.
    getName() - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Hotel
    Returns the hotel name.
    getNotes() - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Guest
    Returns additional notes associated with the guest.
    getNotes() - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Room
     
    getPhoneNumber() - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Guest
    Returns the guest's phone number if provided.
    getPrice() - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Room
     
    getRoom(int) - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Hotel
    Returns the Room with the specified room number or null if not found.
    getRoomNumber() - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Room
     
    getTotalRooms() - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Hotel
    Returns the total number of rooms registered in the hotel.
    Guest - Class in pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model
    Represents a hotel guest.
    Guest(String, String) - Constructor for class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Guest
    Creates a guest with only a first name and last name.
    Guest(String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Guest
    Creates a guest with full optional contact information.
